content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Market is showing sector rotation with power, FMCG, pharma, and financials leading today. Nifty flat around 24,180 with VIX elevated at 18.83. Book is 79% deployed with 10 positions, leaving virtually no room for new entries. Priority is position management — setting SLs on unprotected holdings and trailing up where trades have moved favorably.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "new_target": 90.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position down 3.2% but stock bounced +3.91% today to Rs 78.49. PSU bank sector strong, Q4 results bullish (+18% YoY business growth, fresh 52w high on news). Thesis intact. Setting SL at 74.50 (~5% below entry, below recent swing support at 71.65) and target 90 for R:R of 1.7:1 on avg cost basis."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +2.3% after +10.57% gap up on blowout Q4 (PAT +20%, record dividend, GNPA 0.93%). Strong catalyst. Trailing SL to 955 (just below entry, locks in no loss / small loss hedge) and target 1100 aligned with resistance from prior high. Let the winner run but protect capital on gap-fade."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Slightly down but gold thesis intact as portfolio hedge. Setting protective SL at 119 (~5% below entry, below 20-SMA 121.92) and target 135 for hedge continuity. Neutral sentiment but keeping as portfolio ballast given 18.83 VIX and FII outflows."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1625.00,
      "new_target": 1825.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+3.0% on entry, stock up +5.80% today to new 52w high Rs 1699.50. Nabha Power acquisition + summer demand catalysts. Trailing SL to 1625 (below entry, locks in small cushion relative to momentum) and target 1825 (~7.4% upside). Power sector leadership intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1345.00,
      "new_target": 1525.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Slightly down despite massive Q4 beat (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%, fresh 52w high). Stock consolidating post-gap. Setting SL at 1345 (~4.8% below entry, below today's low 1382 and key support) and target 1525. ICICI Sec TP Rs 1650."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1000.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.1%, but stock broke to fresh 52w high +5.46% today on strong Q4 provisional (advances +25% YoY). Q4 results April 27 catalyst. SL at 1000 (~4.7% below entry, below recent breakout level 997) and target 1150 for R:R ~1.9:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "new_target": 745.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Small loss. Stock near 52w high with 3.7x volume and FDA inspection closed procedurally. Q4 results April 29 catalyst. SL at 645 (~5.3% below entry, below 20-SMA 625) and target 745 (near 52w high Rs 685 + extension)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2265.00,
      "new_target": 2525.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Small loss; stock up +5.98% today on FMCG rotation and Unilever foods-divestiture news. Q4 results April 28. SL at 2265 (~4.5% below entry, below today's low 2336 and well above 20-SMA 2117) and target 2525 in line with Jefferies TP pathway."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "new_target": 430.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Slight loss but stock at/near 52w high of 400.85 with summer demand tailwind and Q4 results May 15. SL at 385 (~4.8% below entry, below 20-SMA 377.98) and target 430. 23 analysts Buy, P/E discount vs sector."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 200.00,
      "new_target": 235.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Slightly positive. Stock +76% YoY, up +6.91% today. Q4 results April 29 is binary event. Shooting star pattern on Apr 20 is a warning. Tight SL at 200 (~6.5% below entry, below 20-SMA 199 and April 20 support at 197.41) and target 235. Reducing conviction given stretched run into earnings."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "reasoning": "Down but PSU bank thesis intact with Q4 catalyst. Hold with defined SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "reasoning": "Big gap-up on earnings beat. Trail SL close to entry to lock in downside protection while allowing further upside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Portfolio hedge; hold with disciplined SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1625.00,
      "reasoning": "New 52w high; SL trailed below entry for breakeven-ish protection."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1345.00,
      "reasoning": "Post-earnings consolidation; give room to absorb profit-taking after gap."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1000.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout to 52w high just after entry; SL just below breakout level."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 catalyst April 29; SL below 20-SMA."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2265.00,
      "reasoning": "FMCG rotation underway; Q4 earnings April 28 catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high with summer demand tailwind; hold into Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 200.00,
      "reasoning": "Stretched run and shooting star into earnings April 29; tighter stop to protect."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AUROPHARMA buyback floor at Rs 1475 is interesting but book is fully deployed — skip. PIRAMALFIN, DEEPAKNTR, ADANIENSOL all gap-ups — chasing day 1 gaps with no capital left is poor R:R. CESC, IEX, TRITURBINE worth observing on volume but no room to add. Power cluster already represented via TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER (~29% of capital) — will not add more power names. FMCG cluster also full with NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed across 10 positions — at the ceiling of 80% deployment rule with only Rs 14,781 remaining deployable. Focus is now purely on position management. Heavy clusters: Power (TORNTPOWER+NTPC+ADANIPOWER ~29%), FMCG (NESTLEIND+HINDUNILVR ~17%), Financials (MAHABANK+PNBHOUSING+AUBANK ~27%). No new entries warranted today — all watchlist names were for situational awareness on day 1 catalysts. Multiple positions have earnings events next week (AUBANK Apr 27, HINDUNILVR Apr 28, GRANULES/ADANIPOWER Apr 29) — may need to de-risk into those prints. Deployment hysteresis engaged: default is NO_ACTION on new entries."
}
